test_output_summary: 49 tests passed in 0.07s. Coverage on src/forge/lifecycle/identifiers.py: 100% line, 100% branch (26 stmts, 0 miss; 8 branches, 0 miss). Black --check and ruff check both clean on the four new files.
implementation_notes: Created the `forge.lifecycle` package as the security boundary for any string later interpolated into a worktree path or the `build_id` PRIMARY KEY. `validate_feature_id` performs a double `urllib.parse.unquote` (catches `%252F`-style double-encoded traversal), then enforces (in order): length 1–64, no `\x00` after decode, allowlist `[A-Za-z0-9_-]+`. Allowlist failures are split into reason `traversal` (`..`, `/`, or `\` after decode) vs. `disallowed_char`. `InvalidIdentifierError` subclasses `ValueError` with `value` and `reason` attributes (vocabulary: traversal, null_byte, disallowed_char, length). `derive_build_id` is a pure composition returning `build-{feature_id}-{strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}` per API-cli.md §3.3 / API-sqlite-schema.md §2.1. Only stdlib imports (re, datetime, urllib.parse) per the Coach Validation block. Tests are class-organised, mirror the AC IDs, follow AAA, and include parametrised positive+negative cases plus boundary tests at len(decoded)==1 and ==64.
requirements_addressed: AC-009: InvalidIdentifierError is a ValueError subclass with structured 'reason' attribute
AC-010: 100% line and branch coverage on the new module (49 tests, all positive+negative branches covered)
AC-011: black --check and ruff check both clean on all four new files

completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_feature_id with allowlist [A-Za-z0-9_-]+; the canonical FEAT-FORGE-001 input round-trips unchanged. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdHappyPath::test_validate_feature_id_with_canonical_input_returns_same_string and the parametrised allowlist test (10 inputs).

Allowlist check rejects '../etc/passwd'; '..' / '/' detection sets reason='traversal'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdTraversal::test_validate_feature_id_with_literal_dot_dot_slash_raises_traversal.

First unquote pass decodes %2E%2E%2F to '../', allowlist rejection then sets reason='traversal'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdTraversal::test_validate_feature_id_with_url_encoded_dot_dot_slash_raises_traversal.

Double unquote: %252F -> %2F -> '/'; the resulting '/' fails the allowlist and is reported with reason='traversal'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdTraversal::test_validate_feature_id_with_double_encoded_slash_raises_traversal.

Explicit `'\x00' in decoded` check with reason='null_byte'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdNullByte::test_validate_feature_id_with_raw_null_byte_raises_null_byte and (additionally) the URL-encoded %00 variant.

`not 1 <= len(decoded) <= 64` raises with reason='length'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdLength::test_validate_feature_id_with_input_above_length_cap_raises_length, and the boundary test confirms len==64 is accepted.
Same length check covers empty input (len==0 fails 1<=len<=64) with reason='length'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdLength::test_validate_feature_id_with_empty_string_raises_length.

derive_build_id uses f-string with strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S'). Verified literally by TestDeriveBuildId::test_derive_build_id_with_canonical_inputs_returns_canonical_string; supplemental tests cover zero-padding, microsecond truncation, and non-UTC timezone passthrough.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `InvalidIdentifierError` is a subclass of `ValueError` with a structured `reason` attribute (one of: `traversal`, `null_byte`, `disallowed_char`, `length`)
completion_promises.evidence: InvalidIdentifierError(ValueError) sets self.value and self.reason in __init__. Verified by TestInvalidIdentifierErrorContract: issubclass(...,ValueError), except-ValueError catches it, reason attribute is exposed and belongs to the documented vocabulary across all four error modes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Unit-test coverage: every branch of the validator has at least one positive and one negative test case (≥ 95% line coverage on this module)
completion_promises.evidence: pytest --cov=forge.lifecycle.identifiers --cov-branch reports 100% line and 100% branch coverage (26 stmts, 0 miss; 8 branches, 0 miss). 49 tests cover happy-path, all four failure-reason branches (traversal, null_byte, disallowed_char, length), and boundary cases at len 1 and len 64.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: `python3 -m black --check src/forge/lifecycle/ tests/unit/lifecycle/` reports '4 files would be left unchanged'. `python3 -m ruff check src/forge/lifecycle/ tests/unit/lifecycle/` reports 'All checks passed!'.
